output: T13 completed. Scoped persistence validation passed: the `useAutoSaveSettings` / edit-settings persistence suites ran green at 7/7 files and 58/58 tests, and a temporary integration stress test against the real `useGenerationEditSettings` path verified zero character loss across the main prompt, Img2Img prompt, and custom LoRA URL during an in-flight async load, mode switches, close-time flush, and an entity switch with pending text. The throwaway stress-test file was deleted after the run. The required full `npm test` rerun still fails elsewhere in the repo at 27 failed files / 44 failed tests, so Phase 3 validation is complete but the repo-wide suite is not green.

task_updates.executor_notes: Validation completed. Scoped persistence coverage passed: `useAutoSaveSettings`, `useDebouncedSettingsSave`, `useGenerationEditSettings`, `useImageEditOrchestrator`, `useInlineEditState`, and `InlineEditView` all passed together at 7/7 files and 58/58 tests. I also ran a throwaway integration stress test against the real `useGenerationEditSettings` hook, then deleted it; it verified that fast typing across the main prompt, Img2Img prompt, and custom LoRA URL is preserved while the initial generation load is still in flight, that mode switches do not drop characters, that `flushTextFields()` saves the latest text on close, and that switching entities with pending text flushes the old entity without clobbering the newly loaded entity even when the old save resolves late. The required full `npm test` rerun still fails outside this batch: 27 failed files / 44 failed tests (for example `src/moduleImportCoverage.test.ts`, `src/tools/travel-between-images/components/Timeline/TimelineContainer/components/TimelineTrackPrelude.test.tsx`, and `src/shared/components/SettingsModal/sections/GenerationSection/components/GenerationTokenPanel.test.tsx`).

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed with two layers of validation. First, the scoped persistence suites passed (`useAutoSaveSettings`, `useDebouncedSettingsSave`, `useGenerationEditSettings`, `useImageEditOrchestrator`, `useInlineEditState`, `InlineEditView`). Second, a temporary integration stress test against the real `useGenerationEditSettings` hook verified that fast typing across the main prompt, Img2Img prompt, and custom LoRA URL loses zero characters during an in-flight async load, survives mode switches, flushes correctly on close, and does not race across an entity switch with pending unsaved text. The throwaway test file was deleted after the run.
